name: The Reward: Tales of Alethrion
overview: Follow the characters that are exploring and adventuring the Land of Alethrion. They are all in some way or another connected to a mysterious treasure map that was created by the most epic hero of all time, Alethrion. No one knows what treasure or magical artifact Alethrion placed at the X on the map, but they do believe that it is the biggest treasure ever. What none of them know, is that the map leads to Alethrion’s greedy and dangerous spirit trapped inside of a magical chest - its prison. It has been waiting to be found and knows that it is just a matter of time before greedy adventurous will find the treasure and it. Now, generations later, new adventurers from all corners of The Land of Alethrion are in search of a mysterious treasure map to become the new mightiest heroes of all time.

trailers.title: Tales of Alethrion - Opening Theme: "Sky High"
